dailyNews.title: Iranian delegation faced threats, altered route mid-flight after failed talks with US in Islamabad: Report
dailyNews.description: Political analyst Mohammad Marandi says Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi and Parliamentary Speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf were forced to alter their travel plans mid-flight, eventually completing their journey via bus and train.

dailyNews.title: Deputy CM, AICC leader condole death of Congress leader Javed in road accident
47% Indians say Iran has won Middle East war, majority see dip in Donald Trump’s credibility: C-Voter survey
dailyNews.description: When divided on the basis of political affiliation, 39 per cent of NDA voters think Iran has been victorious, while 12 per cent think the USA has won. At least 38 per cent of respondents say neither has won the war among NDA-affiliated respondents.

dailyNews.title: Pakistan Army Chief Heads To Iran To 'Deliver US Message' Amid Renewed Talks
dailyNews.description: The discussions between US and Iran are expected to be held soon in Islamabad, as per the report.

dailyNews.title: Pete Hegseth faces impeachment bid by Democrats over Iran strikes, Signalgate row: Report
dailyNews.description: The impeachment resolution, first obtained by the news outlet, focuses on US military operations in Iran, and “Signalgate” controversy.

dailyNews.title: Israel and Hezbollah continue attacks after Israel-Lebanon talks in US
dailyNews.description: Israel strikes hit southern Lebanon and Hezbollah fires rockets at Israel, a day after rare direct negotiations.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to fire Fed chair Powell if he doesn't leave in May
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump's threat marks the latest escalation in his ongoing spat with Jerome Powell.

dailyNews.title: Iran’s cheeky post jabs Trump as ‘powerfool man’, pitches itself as Italy’s ally: ‘We’d like to apply for the vacancy’
dailyNews.description: Iran’s Ghana mission went viral for mocking Donald Trump and offering friendship to Italy after Giorgia Meloni criticised him over Pope Leo.

dailyNews.title: US envoy kicks off Independence Day celebrations with autos featuring Trump's photo in Delhi
dailyNews.description: Autos featuring President of the United States Donald Trump and iconic American images will be rolled out across New Delhi to mark 250 years of US freedom.

dailyNews.title: US-Iran talks: What’s the latest on mediation efforts?
dailyNews.description: Tehran rejects US conditions on nuclear arms; sanctions relief and strait control fuel diplomatic deadlock in Islamabad.

dailyNews.title: What are Iran’s $100bn in frozen assets and where are they held?
dailyNews.description: Iran wants the US to release its frozen assets as part of talks. The money could help it rebuild its battered economy.

dailyNews.title: Xi Jinping will give me a ‘big, fat hug': Trump claims he is reopening Strait of Hormuz, says 'China is very happy'
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump on Wednesday (local time) said that China is very happy that the Strait of Hormuz is being opened permanently, adding that his Chinese counterpart, Xi Jinping, will give him a ‘big, fat hug’ during his upcoming visit to China.

dailyNews.title: ‘Baby Jessica’ makes cryptic Facebook post days after her arrest in domestic assault case
dailyNews.description: Jessica McClure Morales, famously known as "Baby Jessica," posted a cryptic message on Facebook after she was arrested in a domestic disturbance case.

dailyNews.title: Sen Kennedy warns Democrat 'loon wing' has 'fried' the party’s motherboard
dailyNews.description: Sen. John Kennedy ripped Democratic leadership, claiming radical progressives have seized control of the party with what he calls "nauseously woke" policies.

dailyNews.title: Sparks star Cameron Brink shows off toned abs at Coachella ahead of highly anticipated WNBA season
dailyNews.description: Cameron Brink posted Coachella photos showcasing her toned stomach, building excitement ahead of what fans expect to be a breakout season with the Los Angeles Sparks.

dailyNews.title: DAVID MARCUS: How many Swalwell-style creeps are Democrats protecting?
dailyNews.description: Democrat Eric Swalwell's gubernatorial bid collapsed amid sexual impropriety allegations that had allegedly been an open secret in Washington for years.

dailyNews.title: Trump-Tillis tiff deepens as president says he ‘quit,’ concedes Fed fight could doom new chair confirmation
dailyNews.description: Kevin Warsh's Federal Reserve confirmation hearing heads to the Senate next week, but Sen. Thom Tillis, R-N.C., plans to block President Donald Trump's pick over DOJ probe.

dailyNews.title: Biden border officials released alleged killer of Chicago student 'due to lack of space,' documents show
dailyNews.description: Biden-era border officials released alleged killer Jose Medina-Medina despite noting he had no asylum claim, House Judiciary Republicans reveal.

dailyNews.title: On filing deadline, GOP blasts Democrats for opposing Trump tax cuts, ‘making life more expensive’
dailyNews.description: On Tax Day 2026, Senate GOP launches ads in seven key races targeting Democrats who voted against working families tax cuts signed by President Trump.

dailyNews.title: Kimmel, Colbert silent on Eric Swalwell scandal after platforming Democrat
dailyNews.description: "Jimmy Kimmel Live!" and "The Late Show with Stephen Colbert" have not addressed Eric Swalwell's alleged sexual misconduct scandals on Monday or Tuesday.

topStories.title: ‘I’ll have to fire him’: Trump threatens action if Fed chair Powell stays on beyond term
topStories.description: Powell’s term as chair is set to expire on May 15, but he has indicated he will stay on until a successor is confirmed.

topStories.description: Deputies say an armed Arizona man with a Joker-inspired rifle and ballistic vest was arrested near Trump National Golf Course in California.

topStories.title: Border czar Homan fires back at Pope Leo, explains what Vatican leaders ‘don't know’ about immigration
topStories.description: Trump border czar Tom Homan says he is open to talks with Pope Leo XIV amid the administration's feud with the Vatican over immigration.

topStories.title: Pro-life dad whose home was raided by FBI wins $1 mil settlement from DOJ
topStories.description: Mark Houck, arrested by FBI in 2022 over an encounter at a Planned Parenthood clinic, wins seven-figure settlement from the DOJ under President Trump.

topStories.title: From White House hopeful to scandal: Swalwell’s short-lived 2020 bid resurfaces after resignation
topStories.description: Swalwell's political collapse came seven years after his unsuccessful 2020 presidential bid, ending with his resignation from Congress amid allegations.

dailyNews.description: Swalwell's political collapse came seven years after his unsuccessful 2020 presidential bid, ending with his resignation from Congress amid allegations.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Blockade Risks Upending an Emerging Détente With China
dailyNews.description: In a thinly veiled critique of the war in Iran, China’s leader said the world could not risk reverting “to the law of the jungle.”

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Go-To Justification for Contentious Decisions: National Security
dailyNews.description: The administration has invoked national security in a variety of matters, including the White House ballroom and offshore wind farms, drawing rebukes from some judges.

dailyNews.title: Trump Increased Tax Refunds, but a Political Challenge Still Looms
dailyNews.description: While last year’s tax law has raised the average I.R.S. refund, the boost is less than the White House expected — and may not have much impact on voters.

dailyNews.title: King Charles III and Queen Camilla Will Visit D.C., New York and Virginia
dailyNews.description: The planned four-day state visit comes at a fraught time in the U.S.-U.K. relationship, following President Trump’s frequent belittling of the British prime minister.

dailyNews.title: Dr. Erica Schwartz emerges as White House's top pick for CDC leader
dailyNews.description: Dr. Erica Schwartz has emerged as the White House's top pick to lead the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, according to current and former officials.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran war "close to over" amid push for new peace talks
dailyNews.description: With the Iran war paused halfway through a 2-week ceasefire, President Trump is again voicing optimism over the potential for a deal to end it for good.

dailyNews.title: Watch: Protesters interrupt OMB Director Russ Vought's opening statement at House hearing
dailyNews.description: Protesters interrupted OMB Director Russ Vought's opening statement at a House Budget Committee hearing on Wednesday. Vought appeared before the House panel to discuss President Trump's budget request for fiscal year 2027.

dailyNews.title: Latest on Iran as Trump insists war will end soon
dailyNews.description: President Trump is insisting that a deal with Iran is imminent despite disagreement from Tehran on its nuclear capabilities. CBS News' Olivia Rinaldi and Elizabeth Palmer report.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Iran War is 'Close to Over' as Blockade Continues
dailyNews.description: United States Central Command says the American blockade of Iranian ports in and around the Strait of Hormuz is now “fully implemented” as President Donald Trump indicates that a new round of ceasefire talks to end the war could begin by the end of the week. Trump also said that the war’s aims are already mainly accomplished, saying, “I view it as very close to over.” NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

dailyNews.title: Pope Leo's feud with Trump overshadows his spiritual homecoming
dailyNews.description: Pope Leo XIV traveled to St. Augustine's hometown in Algeria only for the trip to be overshadowed by his feud with President Donald Trump and Vice President JD Vance.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran wants 'to make a deal very badly'
dailyNews.description: Trump says Iran wants 'to make a deal very badly'

dailyNews.title: White House holds press briefing
dailyNews.description: Watch live coverage as White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt holds a press briefing.
